registerHere: Don't have an account? Register here
loginHere: Already have an account? Login here
enterOtp: Enter the OTP sent to your email
heroSubtitle: Find the best services and plan your perfect event with us.
loginRejected: Your account has been rejected. Please contact support.
aboutText: CelebrateHub is a one-stop platform that connects users with service providers for their special events. Our vision is to simplify the process of event planning and make every celebration memorable.
contactInfo: Feel free to reach out to us with any inquiries or feedback.
termsIntro: Welcome to CelebrateHub. By using our platform, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.
userAccountsText: Users must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password.
serviceListingsText: Service providers are responsible for the accuracy of their listings. CelebrateHub reserves the right to remove any listing that violates our policies.
bookingsAndPaymentsText: All payments are processed securely through our third-party payment gateways. CelebrateHub acts as an intermediary to facilitate transactions.
userConductText: Users agree not to use the platform for any unlawful or prohibited purpose. This includes harassment, spamming, or engaging in any other harmful activity.
disclaimersText: The platform is provided "as is". CelebrateHub does not guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of any listed service. All transactions are at the user's own risk.
limitationText: CelebrateHub shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the platform.
governingLawText: These terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of the jurisdiction in which CelebrateHub operates.
changesToTermsText: CelebrateHub reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Users will be notified of any changes, and continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
accountRejected: Your account has been rejected. Please register again.
manageServicesDashboardDesc: View, edit, or delete your service listings
customerReviewsDesc: See the feedback from your clients
editProviderProfileDesc: Update your profile and contact information
editCustomerProfileDesc: Update your personal information and preferences
bookingHistoryDesc: View your past and upcoming bookings
newBookingDesc: Plan a new event and find services
